programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: What’s Opera, Titans?
programme.desc: Robin surprises the Titans with a trip to the opera but they soon fall asleep, and all dream about starring in their own operas.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Curse of the Booty Scooty
programme.desc: The Titans go on a mission to retrieve Robin's booty after he 'Booty Scooty's' it off.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 5
programme.desc: Batman pretends to be sick so he and Commissioner Gordon can go around town watching their favourite shows.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Them Soviet Boys
programme.desc: To quickly get through their chores and karate lesson, the Titans learn to montage.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Royal Jelly
programme.desc: Bumblebee offers to help Robin with his leadership skills by teaching him how to act like a queen bee.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Lil' Dimples
programme.desc: Raven enters a beauty pageant in attempts to reconnect with her father.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Strength of a Grown Man
programme.desc: Needing a hero with shrinking powers, but forgetting about Bumblebee, Robin invites The Atom to join their fight against the Brain.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Revolt
programme.desc: Darwin feels bad for the household objects in Elmore and encourages them to rise up.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Signature
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Dad tries to stop Granny Jojo getting married.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mess
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin baby-sit, then baby-lose, Penny’s little sister.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Gift
programme.desc: It's Masami's birthday, but his friends don't know what to get the cloud who has everything.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Possession
programme.desc: Richard Watterson seems supernaturally attached to his old refrigerator.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Apprentice
programme.desc: Gumball sets out to prove to Penny's father that he's good enough for his daughter.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Heart
programme.desc: Mr. Robinson tries and repeatedly fails to win back Gumball and Darwin’s friendship.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Check
programme.desc: When Grandpa Louie gives them a check, the Watterson kids argue over how to spend the money.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Stockton, CA!
programme.desc: The Titans must find a way to keep all the Jump City residents from moving to Stockton.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Had to be There
programme.desc: So she isn’t left out of inside jokes, the Titans time travel to past adventures and insert Bumblebee into their memories.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Collect Them All
programme.desc: After the other Titans are turned into collectibles and disappear, Robin must search yard sales and stores to find them.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Great Disaster
programme.desc: Robin gets amnesia and starts thinking that Hawkman is his mother.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Bug City
programme.desc: Craig discovers a bunch of bugs under a rock and decides to build them a city.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Shortcut
programme.desc: An unusually hot day at the Creek melts all of Kit’s ice pops, so Craig helps her find a short cut to her frozen snack supplier before everyone else melts.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Dance Reynaldo Dance
programme.desc: Vic is desperate to win the cash prize for the dance contest in Monte Macabre and is frustrated that his partner Val won’t let him call all the shots. Instead he chooses a different partner: Reynaldo.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: El Silbon
programme.desc: Victor sets up a haunted corn maze, but the town kids think its lame. Vic decides to make the maze scarier by enlisting the help of El Silbon (The Whistler) to really scare the kids, but El Silbon has plans of his own.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Opie's Fortune
programme.desc: Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Goodbye, Sheriff Taylor
programme.desc: Andy goes to Raleigh, N.C., for a job interview, leaving Barney as acting sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: The Pageant
programme.desc: Aunt Bee wants the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant and Opie is neglected.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: The Darling Baby
programme.desc: Opie finds himself engaged to a mountaineer's new baby.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Andy and Helen Have Their Day
programme.desc: Andy and Helen try to have a picnic, only to be constantly interrupted by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Three Wishes for Opie
programme.desc: When Barney demonstrates gypsy fortune telling to Opie, his wishes appear to come true.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Sigh
programme.desc: Debra is tired of sharing space with Ray, so he gives up the use of their bathroom.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Annoying Kid
programme.desc: Raymond finds himself at war with the rambunctious young son of his new best friends.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: She's the One
programme.desc: Robert is excited because he is dating a new woman and hints that she might be 'the one.'

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Marie's Vision
programme.desc: The Barone men are afraid to spoil Thanksgiving by telling Marie she may need glasses.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: For Whom the Booty Calls
programme.desc: Walden joins a group for adoptive fathers and finds it to be a nice escape from Alan.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Beer-Battered Rip-Off
programme.desc: When Alan breaks up with their social worker to get back together with Lyndsey, Walden worries it will affect Louis' adoption.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: For Your Own Good
programme.desc: Murray is a creature of habit in and around the house. When Beverly changes his favourite easy chair to something new and "better," he flips out. He returns the favour by removing the oven in the kitchen to cook with the "better" microwave.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The President's Fitness Test
programme.desc: Adam is terrified of the upcoming Presidential Physical Fitness Test so Beverly decides to write him a note to get out of the test. The plan backfires when the gym teacher declares the only way to excuse Adam is a presidential pardon.

programme.title: Roseanne: Everyone Comes to Jackie's
programme.desc: Roseanne wants David to move back with them, and Dan never wants to see him again.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Make Room for Daddy
programme.desc: Roseanne finds herself in the midst of a huge family squabble when Fred decides to take Dan's advice and sue pregnant Jackie for custody of the unborn child.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: When Roseanne and pregnant Jackie visit a gay bar with Nancy and her friend, Sharon, Roseanne feels pretty smug and cool - until she is overwhelmed by a surprisingly affectionate admirer.

programme.title: Roseanne: Labor Day
programme.desc: The usual symptoms - panic, pain and incredible joy - announce the imminent arrival of Jackie's child. Even though Fred is the father, Roseanne struggles to limit his participation in the process.

programme.title: Roseanne: Past Imperfect
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan have different ideas about covering one of Dan's father's missed alimony payments. Meanwhile, new parents, Fred and Jackie, still can't figure out whether they love each other or not.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lies My Father Told Me
programme.desc: Ed is lying to Dan about the mental state of his mother, but Roseanne tries to get Dan to accept that the lie was really an act of kindness.

programme.title: Roseanne: I Pray the Lord My Stove to Keep
programme.desc: When Roseanne accepts delivery of too many new stoves for her diner, young D.J., who has found religion, begins spouting words of conscience and surprises Roseanne with some serious ethical questions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Body by Jake
programme.desc: When Bev breaks her pelvis in the retirement home, Roseanne and Dan are shocked to find out how it happened. As a result, Bev is forced to move in with them rather than die of embarrassment in the retirement community.

programme.title: Roseanne: Isn't It Romantic?
programme.desc: While Fred seeks advice on how to propose marriage to Jackie, Dan and Roseanne are rekindling their romance with inspiration from the soap opera 'One Life to Live'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Altar Egos
programme.desc: When they have a titanic ego clash, Roseanne is worried about the future of Fred and Jackie's relationship. It seems they just can't make up their minds, or egos, about walking down the aisle together.

programme.title: Roseanne: Nine Is Enough
programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two for One
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan suffer from pregnancy jitters. Meanwhile, Roseanne accidentally uncovers Darlene's dark secret - she's having an affair.

programme.title: Roseanne: Snoop Davey Dave
programme.desc: There's a snitch in the Conner household. Upset over their recent breakup, David tattles on Darlene. And, to Roseanne's horror, she finds out that Darlene is experimenting with drugs.

programme.title: Roseanne: Girl Talk
programme.desc: When Jackie spills the news that Becky and Mark are having sexual problems, Roseanne steps in to solve their dilemma. The situation snowballs when the men realize that no subject is sacred when it comes to their gossiping wives!

programme.title: Roseanne: Sleeper
programme.desc: Which one of the married Conner women did David have a sexy dream about? There is a flurry of activity to figure out the 'who' and the 'why'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Skeleton in the Closet
programme.desc: It's Roseanne's favorite holiday, Halloween, and Leon's planning a 'gay' soiree at the diner. During the party, Roseanne is horrified to learn about a dark secret in Fred's past.

programme.title: Roseanne: Follow the Son
programme.desc: D.J. is growing up, and Roseanne is having trouble loosening the apron strings. Meanwhile, David is stunned to find that Darlene's planning to move in with her new boyfriend, Jimmy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Punch and Jimmy
programme.desc: After D.J. gets pushed around by the town bully, Dan steps in to teach him the basics of self-defense. Recently dumped by Darlene, David begins overcompensating by acting 'macho'.

programme.title: Roseanne: White Men Can't Kiss
programme.desc: When DJ refuses to kiss a black girl in the school play, Dan broods over the source of DJ's racist attitudes. To everyone's surprise, Fred develops a close friendship with his mother-in-law, Bev.

programme.title: Roseanne: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Waiting for the prenatal test results leave Roseanne and Dan in a panic. Emotions run high as Roseanne mulls over her pregnancy options and consequently excludes Dan from any paternal involvement.

programme.title: Roseanne: Rear Window
programme.desc: A geriatric couple with a penchant for nudity has moved in next door. Darlene worries about how close Becky and David have gotten.

programme.desc: Nanook, a shy Chinook, is the only boy in a litter of four, training to be a sled dog; Rocky the Labradoodle and his brother Stanley grow up poolside; Rollo and Pickles are wiener dogs who aspire to be athletes like their mom, a champion hotdog.

programme.desc: A pit bull puppy longs to explore the city, but first he needs to get the hang of walking. A newborn Collie overcomes her shyness to run with the pack.

programme.desc: Toyger kitten Tonya overcomes her shy nature to befriend a large housemate.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fluffy Puppy Party
programme.desc: A pit bull puppy longs to explore the city, but first he needs to get the hang of walking. A newborn Collie overcomes her shyness to run with the pack.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Little Lion Pups
programme.desc: A bullmastiff puppy sticks to his aunt's side as he tries to follow in her footsteps and become a guard dog. A pair of lowchen pups seek out additional family members. An old English sheepdog finds himself being herded by his tiny sister.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Canines
programme.desc: A litter of orphaned kittens trail a pair of Dandy Dinmont Terriers. The only girl in a litter of four American Bobtails hunts for her place in the pack. Finally, a naughty Tonkinese kitten proves a handful for her prim and proper mom.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Animal BFFs - Cuddly Bear, Cautious Kangaroo
programme.desc: A bear cub befriends a lonely German Shepherd. A deer and a kangaroo have their world turned upside down by a mischievous lemur. A pygmy coat has a hard time fitting in until he meets a shy puppy.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Tubby Puppies
programme.desc: Dexter, a Bulldog who has aspirations to rise above his lazy siblings attempts to prove himself on the agility course. Then, a pack of pups who were rescued from the city streets find themselves in a barnyard full of strange beasts.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Chatty Kitties
programme.desc: A Siamese named Chester searches for a little peace and quiet away from his eight chatty siblings. While working mom Pippa tries to balance her litter of six tiny British Shorthairs with her job at a cat clinic.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Muddy Puppies
programme.desc: At a small farmhouse an adventurous Cairn Terrier named Doogie attempts to befriend a finicky house cat. While a pristine pack of Samoyed pups have to decide whose rules they'd rather follow – their tidy mom or their messy dad.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Kitten Puffs
programme.desc: In a cozy cabin, a pair of Siberian soul mates' relationship is put to the test with the birth of their fireball son Calvin. While at a cats only grooming salon, a Turkish Angora kitten named Izzie has to balance her personal style with life in the salon.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Puppy Giants
programme.desc: An English Mastiff puppy named Dot searches for a little independence from her tag-a-long sister Olive. And Niles, a Small Munsterlander, tries to live up to his breed's reputation as top notch hunting dogs, despite the distraction of his fun-loving mom.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Puppies and Prickles
programme.desc: In the countryside, a German Shepherd mom is training her troop of seven pups to be Search and Rescue dogs. While in the big city an African Pygmy Hedgehog named Prickle is looking for a soft and cuddly companion in a house full of Havanese puppies.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Sock Puppies
programme.desc: In a pack of nine Spinone Italianos, there's only one thing that keeps a timid pup named Wally calm: his security sock. While a few miles away, a mischievous Pug named Oskar is a constant handful for his orderly librarian mom.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Puppy Posse
programme.desc: A Siberian Husky has declared himself the leader of a pack of seven pups, but he'll need to back up his bravado with some real sledding smarts. And in a litter of a dozen Irish Red and White Setters, a little runt named Lil has to prove she can keep up.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Puppy Surprise: Pint-Sized
programme.desc: A Maltese mix named Coco has a surprise litter at an urban animal shelter. Then, a rag doll kitten named Jolene might be more than her mom can handle.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Cuddly Kittens
programme.desc: A pair of Shetland Sheepdogs are concerned that their only pup is getting distracted by the farm's resident Pomeranian Gino. Plus, in a litter full of tailless Manx, one kitten named Charlie is born with a tail and needs to figure out he fits in.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Fab and Furless Kittens
programme.desc: An Abyssinian kitten gets into absolutely everything living in a home full of craft supplies. Meanwhile, an Elf Kitten is left out by her brothers and seeks a friend in furrier places.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Puppy Pros
programme.desc: In a small town, a dog about town named Izzy brings a rare litter of Portuguese Podengo Pequeno pups into the world, led by go-getter Gisele. Meanwhile, an octuplet of Cockapoos train to be therapy dogs.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Shy Kitties
programme.desc: In a cozy home of Himalayans, a shy kitten named Hugo follows in his father's footsteps. While a rags to riches rescue mix brings her brood of puppies to their new dream home and only girl, Honey, makes an unlikely friend.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Rescue Kittens and Water Babies
programme.desc: A pair of rescue kittens are welcomed into their foster home by a cat-loving rescue dog named Sweet Potato. While a Rhodesian Ridgeback pup named Rosie discovers, with the help of a lively older cousin, that swimming can be a whole lot of fun.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Super Pups
programme.desc: Twin Dachshund pups, Lulu and Betty, discover their different personalities with a little bit of guidance from their free spirit father. While a show pup in training, Chinese Crested Dotty, forms an unlikely friendship with rescue Pitbull Bryan.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Graceful Giants
programme.desc: In the lush suburbs, Chip, a Golden Retriever pup tries to get in the middle of the action while a Great Dane born to an agility star mom finds her long legs aren't so conducive to being agile.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Tubby Puppies
programme.desc: Dexter, a Bulldog who has aspirations to rise above his lazy siblings attempts to prove himself on the agility course. Then, a pack of pups who were rescued from the city streets find themselves in a barnyard full of strange beasts.

programme.title: Martin: Lockin' Boots
programme.desc: Martin finds out about a withdrawal Gina made from their bank account to pay a ticket.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: Helen McCarter has everything going for her, until her wealthy husband admits to having an affair and throws her out of the house. A distraught Helen turns to her family as she learns to stand up on her own two feet.

programme.title: Movie: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: A bounty hunter and the con man he's pursuing stumble upon a multi-million dollar stash of diamonds. They are forced to team up in order to catch the criminal responsible.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: A Chance to Love
programme.desc: Gary's insecurities come to light. Karen and Zac find themselves in a familiar place. Danni finds herself the mediator between friends.

programme.title: Twenties: You Know How I Like I
programme.desc: Time is against Hattie as she dashes through Hollywood on various assignments from Ida B. while Nia struggles in an audition.

programme.title: Boomerang: Love Shoulda Brought You Home
programme.desc: Going back to the day of Simon and Bryson's breakup, the gang gives their versions of what went down, revealing what they think of their friends and testing where their loyalties lie.

programme.title: Martin: Go Tell It on the Martin
programme.desc: A distraught man with a bomb strapped to him takes over the station during Martin's show.

programme.title: Martin: 'Xpress Yourself
programme.desc: Gina regrets the changes she was hired to make in Martin's show when Martin changes too.

programme.title: Martin: Sophisticated Ladies
programme.desc: Gina and Pam's dreams of joining an exclusive women's club are jeopardized by Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't Nuttin' Goin' on But the Rent
programme.desc: Martin and the gang stick out the weather after his landlord cuts off the heat.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Boyz in the Woods
programme.desc: Philip, Carlton and Will go on a camping trip, where they get trapped in a mountain cave.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: A Night at the Oprah
programme.desc: The Banks family appears on 'The Oprah Winfrey Show' and their bickering causes an uproar.

programme.title: The Parkers: Love the One You're With
programme.desc: Kim adjusts to the news that Michael is a single father; Prof. Oglevee thinks about Nikki.

programme.title: The Parkers: Baby Girl
programme.desc: With Michael missing after the oil-rig fire, it falls to Kim to care for his daughter.

programme.title: The Parkers: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Professor Oglevee tries to woo Nikki from her new love with the help of Brian McKnight.

programme.title: The Parkers: Not So Super, Supers
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim elect themselves the new supers of their building in exchange for free rent.

programme.title: House of Payne: R.I.P. Rest in Payne
programme.desc: A multi-generational family lives under one roof together.

programme.title: House of Payne: Payne-ful Survival
programme.desc: After being pulled from death's door, Calvin's struggle isn't over. The family finds out that Calvin is uninsured and there's no way for his medical bills to be paid. But they count their blessings as Calvin finally opens his eyes.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Asses to Ashes
programme.desc: Judge Carl Robertson defeats Philip in the election for State Superior Court Judge.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way From the Forum
programme.desc: Will's friend goes into labour while they are stuck in traffic after a basketball game.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Cold War

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mommy Nearest
programme.desc: Will tries to tell his mother he does not want to return to Philadelphia after graduation.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Winner Takes Off
programme.desc: Geoffrey quits his job with the family after believing he won the big lottery.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Robbing the Banks
programme.desc: Valuable items begin to disappear after Will convinces Philip to hire a former convict.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Great Persian Bake Off
programme.desc: Destiney tries to navigate an awkward situation in Vegas after a wild night with the group. GG arranges a cooking class for the crew to bond, but questions how much longer she can keep her journey to motherhood a secret.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Pool Party Massacre
programme.desc: GG grapples with the consequences of continuing to hide her IVF from the group but begins to worry that unnecessary drama will harm her health. Sara and Destiney clash over Destiney's tryst with Sara's brother while the group was in Vegas.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Don't Mess With Destiney
programme.desc: Tommy takes matters into his own hands after Reza’s altercation with MJ at the pool party, furthering the divide between the Shahs. GG’s divorce is finalized as she gets ready to drop a bombshell on the crew.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moms Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: When Todd refuses to celebrate anyone but Faye for Mother's Day, Julie and Lindsie make their own plans. Todd is forced to babysit Jackson but struggles with Lindsie's new age parenting.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: When Todd offers to be a chauffeur for Faye and her sister Francis, he gets more than he bargained for. Meanwhile, Julie opens a boutique real estate office, but things go awry when she offers to sell Savannah's house.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Prank Master
programme.desc: When Savannah decides to drop out of college Todd hatches a plan to get her back in class. Meanwhile Nanny Faye works overtime to pull an epic prank on Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Remission Control
programme.desc: The Chrisley's take it to the gutter with a family bowling tournament. And while Julie waits to hear if her cancer is in remission, the family plans a surprise for her.

programme.desc: Todd and Chase team up for a not so friendly golf match against Jay Demarcus. And Savannah attempts to move in with Nanny Faye only to discover there's no room at the inn!

programme.desc: Todd and Savannah butt heads while planning a fashion show for charity. Meanwhile, Chase helps Nanny Faye apply for a job as a Segway tour guide to win a bet with Todd.

programme.desc: A close knit group of Indian friends and their families balance modern Miami living with their traditional Indian upbringings. When Vishal invites his future mother-in-law to the Diwali Gala, she spills the chai on how she really feels about his family.

programme.title: Family Karma: Family Fun in Flannel
programme.desc: With the dirt on his family out in the open, Vishal does what he does best: sweeps it back under the rug. This doesn't sit well with Anisha who looks to her close friend Bali for some no nonsense straight talk.

programme.desc: Altman goes full hipster in his last ditch effort to sell his an architectural wonder in a trendy Venice neighbourhood. Tracy takes over a stale listing in Brentwood and attempts to revive the grandeur of the historic Georgian estate.

programme.desc: When David's brother Michael puts James and David to the task of finding him a development opportunity, they are led to the famed house where the movie 'Mommie Dearest' was filmed. Flagg battles his control issues when he teams up with Bobby.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: Altman rents a dunk tank to draw buyers to a villa-esque listing that's been on the market for a year. James and David enter heated negotiations on The Playboy Bunny 'Ranch' and where 'Mommie Dearest' was filmed, and Flagg reunites with previous clients.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Naked in the Backyard
programme.desc: James works hard to sell a home to vocal superstar Kelly Rowland. Flagg gets creative to sell a Bel Air pad built for Robby Kreiger, the guitarist for The Doors. Tracy lands a shot at representing a billion dollar development in Dubai.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Dubai It
programme.desc: Tracy travels to Dubai to earn a listing that could change her life, and hangs with friend and local celeb Caroline Stanbury. Altman hunts down a mystery property in Malibu to house dozens of luxury cars for an important client.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Collision Course

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Raised from a calf by a young girl, Ferdinand is a massive bull whose physical size is rivalled only by the size of his heart. When the bovine is mistakenly thought to be an aggressive beast, he's captured and forced to fight against his will.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie

programme.title: Movie: A Million Ways to Die in the West
programme.desc: A craven sheep farmer in the perilous Old West meets and falls for a mysterious new woman in town who helps him develop confidence, courage and shooting skills. His new bravery is put to the test when her outlaw husband rides into town and wants payback.

programme.title: Movie: Blazing Saddles

programme.desc: A beautiful young woman must be rescued from her cruel fiancé by her one true love.

programme.title: Blue Planet Now: Wonders of the Reef

The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: How the South Pacific islands has affected human culture.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland Extended Stay: The New Girl

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa Extended Stay: The Damage is Done
programme.desc: One inmate meets an untimely demise, and a convicted murderer breaks down the ways of prison, while a young, fresh-faced inmate learns about them. Another inmate mails a death threat to the White House and then carries out a shocking act.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa Extended Stay: You Reap What You Sow
programme.desc: All the inmates on the Restricted Labor Squad have been in confinement for disciplinary violations, but are now nearing release back to general population.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa Extended Stay: Blood Lines
programme.desc: An inmate takes drastic action and leaves his cell a bloody mess while another is found with dangerous contraband. Plus, an old-timer counts his losses, and a younger inmate looks forward to hitting the streets.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Islands of Monsters

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Ghost Ship Terror
programme.desc: Ghost ship sightings are frequent in the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge underwater technology and witness testimony, a team of experts turn up new evidence to explain why sailors and crewmen vanish from their boats without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Witchcraft in the Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A new lead might finally solve the mystery of the Witchcraft, one of the strangest disappearances on record in the Bermuda Triangle. A cutting-edge expedition leads experts to a shocking discovery on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Kevin/ Jason

programme.title: Twisted Fate: Unbreakable

programme.title: Twisted Fate: Shattered Truth

programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Crazy in Love
programme.desc: In a small New Hampshire Town, a volatile widow ignites a raging inferno that will leave a path of destruction in its wake. And later, an abusive boyfriend high on steroids, and unpunished by a broken justice system, explodes with an unpredictable wrath.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Kiss 'n Kill
programme.desc: A highly successful couple is the envy of all their friends. But an insatiable lust for fame will end in anguish. Then, a pious woman begins a storybook marriage, until an unholy secret takes root.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secret
programme.desc: Danyall White tells the gripping true story of her brother Richard. Danyall always thought he was a prankster who told stories. But when his stories started getting more and more violent, she slowly realized that her brother was hiding a monstrous secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: First Love, Forever Evil
programme.desc: Melissa Holland was certain that her high school boyfriend, Michael Overstreet, was the man she'd always dreamed of. But only after they were married did she begin to realize that her determination to live happily ever after had put her in mortal danger.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Not My Boy
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller never suspected that the man terrorizing their city could be a member of their own family. As it dawns on them that their son is hiding a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Comes to My Dreams
programme.desc: When Gwen Bailey married Norman Starnes she counted herself lucky to land the most eligible bachelor in town. But years later, she discovered she never really knew him at all. And by the time she finally realized, she was already his unwilling accomplice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In the Lion's Cage
programme.desc: Linda Wittmier and Terry Jo Howard both fell in love with James Michael Randall. And both suffered when they discovered the monster that lurked inside him. But they never realized how lucky they were to survive his twisted sexual desire to kill.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath
programme.desc: On the day Robert Foust contemplated killing his own son, Aaron, he saw it as the only way to prevent Aaron from becoming a murderer. But instead, Robert chose to put himself and his son in God's hands. And God's plan would make him question everything.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: See No Evil: Silent Witness
programme.desc: A husband and respected businessman vanishes after a meeting. Meanwhile a young mother doesn't come back from her job search. Cops can only rely on one witness-one that never lies-surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: Must Find Mickey
programme.desc: 21-year-old Mickey Shunick is missing after a night out. Her family is terrified and mobilizes the local community to help search for her. Police are unable to find any trace of the Louisiana student -- until they spot her on surveillance video...

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Babysitter
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her off at home. Her distraught mother Virginia says she never walked through the door. Police are baffled until they uncover a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: See No Evil: Shadow of Hope
programme.desc: On December 26th 2011, Hope Melton vanishes after being run off a country road. CCTV footage from a nearby gas station reveals a suspicious orange car that seems to have followed her out of the parking lot.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Become a Neo-Nazi
programme.desc: John Ditullio beat a homeless man to death and killed a neighbour who he felt was an enemy of the white race.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape With One Leg
programme.desc: Walter Rhodes and two other suspects were involved in the murder of two cops. Rhodes agrees to testify against the others for a lesser sentence and is eventually released. Shortly afterwards, he violates his parole but refuses to go back.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Banks
programme.desc: Joe Loya is a professional bank robber, addicted to the adrenaline of power. After 13 months of successful robberies, Loya's luck runs out when one robbery goes wrong. It's the latest in bank technology that leads investigators to Loya and ends his spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Become a Neo-Nazi
programme.desc: John Ditullio beat a homeless man to death and killed a neighbour who he felt was an enemy of the white race.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape With One Leg
programme.desc: Walter Rhodes and two other suspects were involved in the murder of two cops. Rhodes agrees to testify against the others for a lesser sentence and is eventually released. Shortly afterwards, he violates his parole but refuses to go back.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Banks
programme.desc: Joe Loya is a professional bank robber, addicted to the adrenaline of power. After 13 months of successful robberies, Loya's luck runs out when one robbery goes wrong. It's the latest in bank technology that leads investigators to Loya and ends his spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Most Amazing View

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Restored: 1910 Arts and Crafts Family Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1910 arts and crafts farmhouse for a family who relocates from the big city to the countryside of Cherry Valley, California. They hope to become organic farmers and want to include elements for the family farm and business.

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Revival
programme.desc: Brett restores a classic Spanish Colonial Revival that hasn't been touched in years because the owner is a professional musician who is always on the road. He must make the kitchen and bath functional while staying true to the home's character.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Year of the Cupcake
programme.desc: The Year of the Dragon is about to begin, as four bakers battle to have their cupcakes at the Los Angeles celebration of the Chinese New Year.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Wicked
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers battle for a place at the star-studded party for the Los Angeles opening of the hit Broadway musical 'Wicked.'

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter Treats
programme.desc: Nine of the best bakers in America embrace the spirit of the Spring Baking season by creating Easter egg desserts and bunny cakes.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Sweet Vacations
programme.desc: For the eight remaining bakers, spring vacations inspire tropical desserts and destination doughnuts based on locations such as a poolside resort, a spring cruise and a Vegas getaway.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Derby Desserts
programme.desc: Big colorful hats, stunning racehorses, roses and bourbon! The seven remaining bakers celebrate the Kentucky Derby with their takes on mint julep desserts and cookie garlands.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Springtime Remodeling
programme.desc: When the weather gets nice, it's time for some remodeling! The six remaining bakers attempt to lighten up a dense, dark brownie and give a classic Napoleon a springtime twist.

programme.title: Winner Cake All: Guy's Grocery Cakes
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis challenges the baking teams to create a cake decoration that looks like their favorite celebratory feast.

programme.title: UFC 200 Greatest Fighters of All Time: 10-1
programme.desc: The UFC's definitive and debatable list reaches the top ten. See who takes the top spot in this ranking of all-time greats as determined by statistics, historians, media, fighters and fans.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: A Mountain to Climb
programme.desc: The journey of Pratima Sherpa, a 17-year-old girl who was raised in a maintenance shed behind the third green on the Royal Nepal Golf Club and aspires to become Nepal's first female professional golfer.

programme.title: ESPN Championship Pup
programme.desc: ESPN's campus is turned into a doggie competition arena, including the addition of a 20,000 gallon dock diving pool, for live action in three different American Kennel Club dog venues: Agility, Dock Diving, and Flyball.

programme.title: UFC 235
programme.desc: Anthony Smith faces off against light heavyweight champion Jon Jones in mixed martial arts action at T-Mobile Arena. Jon Jones vs. Anthony Smith

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Paradise: From the Ashes
programme.desc: The emotional journey of the Paradise High School football team, one year removed from the wildfires that scorched their town and claimed 86 lives. E:60 follows the Paradise Bobcats on their path to rebuild.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Game One
programme.desc: After 40 years, ESPN reflects on the very first contest aired on the network, a softball game that took place in Lannon, Wisconsin.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Leaf
programme.desc: Sharing his descent from NFL fame to addiction, former quarterback Ryan Leaf tells his inspiring story of recovery and dedication to helping others.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Heir McNair
programme.desc: The legendary career of NFL quarterback Steve McNair, ten years following his murder. In a rare series of interviews with his family, we learn how they coped with his death and how his athletic legacy is carried on by his son, Tyler.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Mandarich
programme.desc: In Jeremy Schaap's longest interview at ESPN, he tells the fascinating life story of 1989 NFL Draft pick Tony Mandarich.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Fight On: The Jake Olson Story
programme.desc: A look at the incredible story of USC long-snapper Jake Olson who made history as the first blind athlete to play in a Division I college football game.

programme.title: Movie: Coming Home for Christmas

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sea Lamprey Exterminator
programme.desc: In Michigan, Mike helps the U.S. Department of Fish & Wildlife control the sea lamprey population that is jeopardizing the fishing industry of the Great Lakes. Then at Mandalay Bay Casino Mike makes 'meat gel' to feed the fish in the shark reef aquarium.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Blueberry Connoisseur
programme.desc: Mike creates an 'interesting' flavour at the Jelly Belly Candy Company.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sponge Diver
programme.desc: Mike heads to Tarpon Springs, Florida to help collect sponges off the sea floor. Then he answers viewer mail and recounts his struggle with a metal fence post at an abandoned mine.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Termite Researcher
programme.desc: Mike visits with long-time fans Marilyn and Carolyn Maedel to look at never-before-seen footage at a crawfish factory in Louisiana. Then, he experiences the many hands-on duties that come with being a termite researcher on Sapolo Island in Georgia.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Concrete Finisher
programme.desc: Mike heads to Moss Landing, California to learn the art of making decorative concrete countertops and fire pits. He then recounts the scariest jobs he has ever done in his career.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mattress Recycler
programme.desc: Mike heads to Miami to recover and crush abandoned boats and then he recycles mattresses in San Francisco.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Soo Locks Technician
programme.desc: Mike heads to Sault Saint Marie, Michigan, to work with the Soo Locks maintenance crew.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Locomotive Builder
programme.desc: Mike heads to MotivePower in Boise, Idaho to build and restore locomotives for his 200th dirty job.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Maple Syrup Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to San Francisco to find out what the paint bulking process involves then he heads to Wagner's Sugar Camp in Pennsylvania to spend the day making syrup.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Date Palm Pollenator
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs where he collects pollen from male date palm pods and pollinates female trees. He also shows never before seen footage and answers viewer mail.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cricket Farmer
programme.desc: Mike heads to Augusta, Georgia to spend the day working on a cricket farm where he helps to breed, capture and package the crickets.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Global Game Show: Incredible Engineering

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Portals to Punishment
programme.desc: Josh visits three sites where the journey is the destination. He follows a coca leaf farmer down Bolivia's perilous Death Road, explores history's most feared prison in French Guiana and investigates a mysterious 12,000-year-old structure in Turkey.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Two Legends
programme.desc: Jimmy goes kayak fishing with Roland Martin in Florida.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Seasons on the Fly Lodge 2019
programme.desc: We go to the Seasons on the Fly Lodge on Alaska's Kvichak River.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Army Medal of Honor Recipient - Al Lynch
programme.desc: A decorated Vietnam veteran recounts saving the lives of three men and life after receiving the medal of honour from Nixon.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Patching it Together
programme.desc: Captain Chris Hanson take George and Lain reef fishing on the coast of Key Largo. The Fish Guyz learn how the Lionfish are affecting the Atlantic Waters off the Florida Keys.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Dry Tortugas, FL Keys - Light Tackle/Huge Bottom Fish
programme.desc: Light spin tackle for oversized bottom fish off the Dry Tortugas.

programme.title: Silver Kings: Captain Jack
programme.desc: South African filmmaker Jako Lucas visits America to fish for Atlantic Tarpon.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: No Sancocho Sailfish Shootout
programme.desc: Rick is at a billfish tournament at Casa Vieja Lodge in Guatemala.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Tyler's Trial
programme.desc: In the legendary Palmer goldfields, Parker and his team encounter a lucrative family-run mining operation and discover dirt far richer than anything they've ever seen in the Yukon. But convincing the family to lease him virgin ground will come at a price.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out
programme.desc: In Northern California, the Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of the Olson-Wilcox family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout
programme.desc: In a first-ever Homestead intervention, a daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead in Arizona sits in the crosshairs of deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Little Person, Big Challenge
programme.desc: Underestimated his whole life, a survivalist with dwarfism tries to prove himself in the Amazon but struggles against predators and his partner.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving the Outdoors

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Lightning and High Winds

programme.title: Hoarders: Barbara G/ Fred and Mary

programme.title: Hoarders: Dee/ Jan
programme.desc: Dee blew a $150,000 legal settlement to fulfill her hoarding obsession. Jan admits she's been living in filth for years. She hasn't taken the trash out since 2006 and goes months without showering.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joni and Millie
programme.desc: Child Protective Services had to take Joni's granddaughter away from her because of her hoarding. Also, Millie has already tried to clean up her act, only to relapse and start hoarding again. Daughter Chelsea has one last ultimatum for her.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy
programme.desc: Adventurers inadvertently resurrect a malevolent force with unspeakable power.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy Returns

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice
programme.desc: Two teams duke it out against the catastrophic concoctions from Chef Willie.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst. Hot Sauce. Ever
programme.desc: Two comic book guys go against two twerkin' besties. The 'Constrictor Sauce' knocks the comic book guys to their knees, but the keep fighting for the prize.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chrissy Teigen

programme.title: Hot Ones: Ken Jeong
programme.desc: Ken Jeong battles against Sean Evans and the wings of death, all while dispelling common medical myths and discussing his encounters with NB legends like Shaq and Kevin Durant.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Jonas Brothers
programme.desc: The Jonas Brothers battle against the wings of death while discussing topics such as Met Gala hangouts with OBJ and Taylor Swift's anti-paparazzi techniques.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Adam Devine
programme.desc: Adam Devine patriotically challenges the wings of death; all while channeling Macho Man Randy Savage and his Pitch Perfect audition.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 7
programme.desc: A tipsy Mayor earning a DUI, some severe Australian road rage, and a snowmobile avalanche you won't believe.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: While posing as a security guard, Michael turns a metal detector into a microwave. Plus, a mover is dumbfounded when a woman rises from the ashes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Living Trilobite
programme.desc: As a bank teller, Michael proves chipmunks are nature's accountants, and later, Michael stuns a museum worker by bringing a fossilized creature to life.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Impractically Carbonaro Jokers Effect

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: On the Hot Seat
programme.desc: Chief Terry is under scrutiny by the City Council to get serious about his station's ratings, while his crew inadvertently puts his job in jeopardy by engaging in a ridiculous firehouse competition for a super sawft prize.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Cop Wars
programme.desc: Andy and Ike's misstep on a call to a Tacoma police officer's house fans the flames of the FD's long-standing feud with the PD. Chief struggles to keep a lid on the dispute.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: A New Hope

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Training Day
programme.desc: The Tacoma FD's negligence during a firehouse school trip makes Councilwoman Price so angry that she orders the guys to complete a training recertification with an old nemesis who's just itching to fail them.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.
